shared_properties: Overlay cards keep the 200x120 px panel size defined for pause, game over, and clear screens.
Typography uses the same pixel-font framing and dark dungeon palette as the gameplay HUD.
differences: This atlas packages pause, game_over, and clear overlay cards as three discrete states with distinct title lettering and badge accents.

reference_images.label: Slip Down GDD mirror
reference_images.purpose: Pause, game over, and clear screen sizes plus text role grounding.

reference_images.label: Slip Down moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Overlay contrast and dungeon ambience grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use a TextureAtlas-backed ImageNode for the centered overlay card while gameplay text and record values render in sibling UI text nodes.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/pause_game_over_overlay_sheet.png through AssetServer and store the atlas handle in the overlay state resource keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Frames map to pause, game_over, and clear states in that order.
Center the panel at the screen midpoint with integer coordinates.

context.role: Centered overlay card used for pause, game over, and clear states.
context.usage: Shown only when active play is interrupted, failed, or completed.

deliverables.notes: Three 200x120 overlay cards for pause, game_over, and clear states.
State map for pause, game_over, and clear overlay frames.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas size is exactly 600x120 px with three 200x120 overlay frames.
Pause, game_over, and clear titles are visually distinct while preserving one shared framing language.
Cards leave empty text regions for live timer and record values without clipping the title lettering.
